title: Create sheet view: destination list, presets, submit, inline errors
action: Add web/src/views/create-sheet.ts rendering the bottom sheet per parent D2 (docs/history/new-shell-new-agent/CONTEXT.md): a destination list on top -- one row per destination, label + path -- then action rows below -- 'Shell' first, then one row per preset. Per parent D3, the destination row is a single combined choice (workspace + its folder shown together), never two separate pickers. A destination row with path: null or path_is_live: false carries a visible inline caveat (S2) -- do NOT implement S1's disambiguating suffix here, that is a separate future cell. Selecting a destination then tapping Shell calls api.ts's createPane; tapping a preset row calls createAgent with that preset's label. A create-call error (S3) renders inline within the still-open sheet using the backend's message from cell 1's discriminated result -- the sheet is never dismissed on error. A successful create invokes an onCreated callback carrying exactly cell 2's exported NewPaneRef type (import it from web/src/main.ts): pane_id (+ name when an agent was created) from the create response, workspace_id/label from the destination that was used -- construct this value here, do not invent a different shape. Follow switcher.ts's conventions: escapeHtml every user-sourced string, template-literal rendering, addEventListener wiring after innerHTML assignment, and terminal.ts's reply-sheet (hidden/shown div, not a route change) as the open/close pattern precedent.

truths: Every destination from the fetched create-options response is listed, including one with path: null and one with path_is_live: false
A row with path: null or path_is_live: false carries a caveat visibly distinct from a normal row
Shell is always the first action row; preset rows follow the order the API returned
Tapping Shell or a preset while a request is already in flight does not fire a second overlapping request
A 409/400/502 error renders inline with the backend's message and the sheet stays open and usable afterward
onCreated is called with a value typed exactly as cell 2's exported NewPaneRef, built from the create response plus the destination used

artifacts.substantive: exports a render function and its props type, no stubs

key_links: create-sheet.ts imports fetchCreateOptions/createPane/createAgent from api.ts and NewPaneRef from main.ts
prohibitions: Do not implement S1 (disambiguating suffix) in this cell
Do not touch web/src/views/switcher.ts (wiring is a separate cell)
Do not send argv, a preset id, or any field beyond {workspace_id} / {workspace_id, preset} in request bodies
Do not redefine or restate NewPaneRef's field set -- import cell 2's type

verify: cd web && npm run typecheck && npm run test -- --run test/create-sheet.test.ts

trace.outcome: Added web/src/views/create-sheet.ts rendering the create bottom sheet (destination list + Shell/preset action rows), backed by web/test/create-sheet.test.ts covering S2 caveats, action ordering, both create paths, overlap-guard, and inline S3 error handling.
trace.verify_output: tsc --noEmit: no errors. vitest: Test Files 1 passed (1), Tests 6 passed (6).
trace.verify_command: cd web && npm run typecheck && npm run test -- --run test/create-sheet.test.ts
